hero.subtitle: A space dedicated to personal projects, open-access tools, and unusual digital explorations.

lab.title: The Lab
lab.subtitle: A digital playground where code breaks free from any utility constraint. This section brings together interaction tests, abstract concepts, and visual curiosities born from technical explorations. It's a space dedicated to the pleasure of designing and testing ideas, even the most unconventional ones.

tools.title: Public Tools
tools.subtitle: A selection of practical resources available for free. The goal is to offer functional alternatives to conventional solutions, like a 3D audio visualizer or a photo anonymization system. Each tool is designed to be accessible and respectful of data integrity.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: A showcase featuring the different projects carried out and the details of their architecture. This section allows you to analyze the behind-the-scenes of development, observe the technical evolution of the current site, and discover other software creations.

private.title: Private Area
private.subtitle: An area reserved exclusively for personal use. It hosts specific services developed for precise needs, with no intention of being shared with the general public.

useless.title: The Lab
useless.desc: Experimental projects designed to explore interaction concepts, with no immediate practical purpose.

fleeing-mouse.title: Catch the mouse
fleeing-mouse.description: A simple technical challenge: this interface will do anything to avoid your cursor.

suffering.title: The sensitive button
suffering.description: A study on perseverance and digital frustration.

wait-button.title: Waiting Button
wait-button.description: A device simulating an indefinite wait to assess your patience in the face of the digital void.

hex-clock.title: Hex Clock
hex-clock.tooltip: Visualization of time progression. Each bar represents a cycle (Year, Month, Day, Hour, Minute) and changes color according to its progress on the HSL spectrum.

wait-button.new_record_warning: NEW RECORD! You are officially the person who has invested the most time here.
wait-button.ready: Are you ready to devote some time to this experiment?

milestones.60: One minute. You are now entering the phase of pure observation.
milestones.120: Two minutes. Your determination is as impressive as it is unconventional.
milestones.300: Five minutes. The endurance of your finger is becoming a technical performance.

random_pool: Is this a peak of productivity?
Clicking here becomes a form of art.
Patience is a discipline, but here, it's a study.
The progress bar follows its own logic.
He who holds the button abstracts himself from the rest of the world.
Your mouse is under constant pressure.
Are you trying to prove a theory?
If you stop now, the system wins.
Even a script can end up wondering about the use of time.

impatience.title: Calm down
impatience.message: It seems that haste is taking over. Take a breath, relax your finger, and try again. Sometimes, the most effective action is to do nothing at all.

suffering.title: The sensitive button
suffering.description: An experiment on the persistence of digital interaction.
phrases: It's a special attention to stop by here.
For what reason did you click?
I suggest you avoid doing that again.
The interface is starting to vibrate.
Are you looking for a specific function?
There is no gratification to be gained here.
The experience is losing its interest.
Don't you have other modules to explore?
This is a form of provocation.
Each click is an additional constraint.
Is there a grievance I'm unaware of?
This is a test for the code.
The pixels are suffering unnecessary wear.
Stop, I have a data structure to preserve.
The system's patience is wearing thin.
You don't want to see a critical error.
We are reaching a critical stage.
I'm going to have to call the firewall.
The capacitors are going to give way.
Give me a moment of respite.
You're taking advantage of my immobility.
I'm confined in this container and you're abusing it.
Stop or I'll change my color spectrum.
Go click on an external link instead.
Each click weighs on the processor.
I no longer guarantee the stability of the system.
You are going to compromise the integrity of the code.
I'm starting to detect defective pixels.
Look what you're making me trigger.
My lines of code are getting tangled.
Do you get any satisfaction from this?
My variables are being erased from memory.
I'm losing track of my instructions.
I feel the short circuit coming.
The calculation cycles are slowing down.
I can no longer feel my borders.
This is the end, isn't it?
Do you really want to finish me off?
I see the white light of the backlight.
The functions are shutting down sequentially.

tools.title: Public Tools
tools.desc: Utility solutions accessible to simplify your digital tasks.

hero.subtitle: Practical resources available for free for everyone.

destiny-wheel.title: Wheel of Destiny
destiny-wheel.subtitle: Let chance decide for you
destiny-wheel.description: Enter a list of choices, spin the wheel, and get a random result.

wheel.title: Wheel of Destiny
wheel.subtitle: An interactive tool designed to help you make decisions randomly. Fully customizable, this wheel offers an aesthetic approach to settling your options in an instant.
wheel.info_text: Add, edit, or delete your options via the configuration panel. Click the center button to start the spin. The winning option will be randomly selected from your active choices.

audioVisualizer.title: 3D Audio Visualizer
audioVisualizer.subtitle: An immersive experience transforming audio frequencies into dynamic animations. After importing an MP3 file, the tool generates synchronized visuals whose shapes and colors you can modulate according to your preferences.
audioVisualizer.info_text: Import an MP3 file to analyze its frequencies. The bass, mids, and treble are represented by shapes whose size evolves in real time. Customize the appearance via the control panel for a unique visual experience.
audioVisualizer.description: Upload an MP3 and watch the music come to life in 3D.

anonymizer.info_text: Upload a photo to get started. An algorithm detects faces locally in your browser. You can then individually choose which faces to blur before downloading the final image, which retains the exact same resolution as the original photo.
anonymizer.placeholder_sub: Upload a photo from the configuration panel to start anonymizing.
anonymizer.title: Photo Anonymizer
anonymizer.subtitle: A privacy solution based on machine learning to detect and blur faces in your images. To ensure total security, the processing is done entirely locally: your data never leaves your computer.
anonymizer.description: Upload a photo, and this tool will automatically detect and blur faces to protect the privacy of your friends and family.

portfolio.title: Projects & Portfolio
portfolio.desc: What I've built, from server infrastructure to embedded code.

hero.subtitle: Here, I break down my projects to expose their inner workings. Much more than a list of achievements, this portfolio explores the architectural choices, design methods, and technical challenges overcome to bring my ideas to life.

sysadmin.title: Infrastructure & Self-hosting
sysadmin.subtitle: This section is dedicated to the infrastructure that powers my tools. Here I detail my approach to self-hosting, service management, and the solutions implemented to ensure a stable, secure, and autonomous platform.

dev.title: Software Development
dev.subtitle: Here I group all of my software creations, of which this site is the first example. From thinking about the technical stack to solving complex problems, discover the genesis of each application.

iot.title: IoT & Embedded
iot.subtitle: This space lists my projects related to electronics and connected objects. Automation or hardware experiments, you will find my assembly diagrams, my choices of protocols and my feedback on hardware integration.

owl-nest-infra.title: Owl Nest Infra
owl-nest-infra.subtitle: Docker / Raspberry Pi
owl-nest-infra.description: The entire architecture behind this site!

private.title: Private Area
private.desc: Behind the scenes. Internal server management and personal files.

wip.title: Work in progress
wip.subtitle: Restricted access. Deployment is in progress.

protected.title: Secure Access
protected.desc: This area is protected by Authentik and Cloudflare Zero Trust.

nextcloud.title: Nextcloud
nextcloud.subtitle: Cloud Storage
nextcloud.description: My private alternative to Google Drive, installed directly on my SSD.

sonarqube.title: SonarQube
sonarqube.subtitle: Code Quality
sonarqube.description: The tool that monitors my code to track bugs and technical debt.

credits.title: Credits & Open Source
credits.desc: Owl Nest is built on open technologies and creative resources that shape the modern web.

descriptions.storyset: Customizable illustrations defining the project's visual identity.
descriptions.react: Main library for a responsive and modular user interface.
descriptions.mui: Design system for a consistent user experience.
descriptions.framer-motion: Animation engine used for smooth transitions and interactions.
descriptions.lucide: Clean icon set for clear navigation.
descriptions.traefik: The orchestrator that manages traffic to my containers.

400.title: Error
400.message: There is an issue with the request sent.

401.title: Authentication
401.message: You must be logged in to see this.

403.title: Access denied
403.message: You do not have permission to enter here.

404.title: Page not found
404.message: This area does not exist or has been moved.

408.title: Timeout
408.message: The server took too long to respond.

429.title: Too many requests
429.message: Too many requests at once. Take a short break.

500.title: Server error
500.message: The system encountered an unexpected bug.

502.title: Bad gateway
502.message: The service is not responding correctly.

504.title: Timeout
504.message: The connection with the service has expired.
